intro: Oreocharis stewardii, also known as the Chinese Oreocharis, is a type of flowering plant in the Gesneriaceae family. Traditionally used in Chinese medicine, Oreocharis stewardii is valued for its potential health benefits, including the treatment of fever, cough, and respiratory issues due to its anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties. The bioactive constituents of Oreocharis stewardii include alkaloids, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. In herbal medicine, Oreocharis stewardii is commonly prepared as a decoction, capsule, or tea, often used to relieve colds, bronchitis, and other respiratory conditions.
